questionHtml: Scientists demonstrated that cinnamon increased neural plasticity in some parts of mouse brains. Explain how neural plasticity could have affected learning in poor performer mice.
markschemeHtml:
a. developing neurons form multiple synapses, so there are more connections between neurons ✔

b. synapses that are not used do not persist/neural pruning ✔

c. less synapses means there is less interference of stimuli / less background noise ✔

d. neurons/synapses that are used a lot are reinforced so information is accessed faster in neurons ✔

meta.title: Scientists demonstrated that cinnamon increased neural plasticity in some parts of mouse brains. Explain how neural plasticity could have affected learning in poor performer mice.
